changelog: TWO-PART FIX for the rail-RIGHT focus bug. Part 1: tvFocusable now accepts an optional focusRequester parameter that's bound INSIDE its composed{} block right before its internal .focusable(). This guarantees requestFocus() lands on the EXACT focusable that draws the cyan ring, instead of binding to the wrong (outer redundant) focusable. Part 2: the rail's RIGHT-arrow now defers requestFocus() through a state ticker + 320 ms LaunchedEffect — exactly the same path as the user's discovered workaround 'press UP then DOWN within home', which always worked because of the 320 ms settle delay.
All home rows (Discovery, SS, Genres, Collections, Years, Themes & Moods) now use the same first-card-direct-bind pattern via the new tvFocusable focusRequester parameter.
